Jonathan’s Victory over the Philistines

NoteOr around the rock of Rimmon or in the pomegranate cave; see Judges 20:45, Judges 20:47, and Judges 21:13.
NoteHebrew half a yoke. A yoke was the amount of land plowed by a pair of yoked oxen in one day.
NoteOr and a terrible panic spread
NoteOr melting away and going here and there
NoteHebrew; LXX “Bring the ephod.” For at that time he wore the ephod before the Israelites.
